## Type of change

- [ ] New exercise / solution
- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect TODO skeleton or broken solution)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, comments)

## Exercise checklist (if adding/modifying exercises)

- [ ] Exercise skeleton compiles with `make ARCH=riscv64` inside Docker
- [ ] Exercise skeleton compiles with `make ARCH=x86_64`
- [ ] All `TODO` stubs are present and return safe defaults
- [ ] Corresponding solution added/updated in `sandbox/solutions/`
- [ ] Solution compiles and produces plausible benchmark output
- [ ] Step-by-step `STEP N:` walkthrough comments cover every non-trivial block

## Documentation checklist

- [ ] `sandbox/README.md` exercise map updated (if exercise added/removed)
- [ ] `sandbox/solutions/README.md` solution index updated
